title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 41.130 - Honorary staff members, governor may appoint
text:
41.130.  Honorary staff members, governor may appoint. — The governor may appoint an honorary staff to consist of such number of honorary aides with the brevet title of military colonel or naval captain as he may desire.
(RSMo 1939 § 15015, A.L. 1951 p. 654 § 10) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 13822; 1919 § 7350
